overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Death Stranding) showing a character with a large backpack traversing a rainy, mountainous landscape. The character encounters spectral figures with blue lights, crosses grassy highlands and wetlands, and explores ancient stone ruins in a misty, desolate environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain slope with sparse vegetation

events.description: spectral figures with glowing blue lights appear on the ridge ahead
one spectral figure runs past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky mountain slope carrying a large backpack

notable_agents.action: spectral figures with glowing blue lights standing on the ridge
one spectral figure runs quickly past the camera from right to left

jagged mountain peak shrouded in mist and clouds
patches of dry grass and small vegetation on the slope

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky mountain slope in rainy conditions. Spectral figures with glowing blue lights appear on the ridge ahead, and one runs past the camera from right to left, creating a tense atmosphere in the desolate landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy highland plateau with wetland areas

events.description: terrain opens up to wide grassy plateau with expansive mountain views
passing small water pools and wetland areas in the grassland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the grassy plateau toward the distant mountain range

range of jagged peaks visible through the mist
shallow water pools and wetland patches in the grassland

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a wide grassy plateau with expansive views of the distant mountain range. The terrain features small water pools and wetlands, with the landscape opening up from the narrow rocky slope to a broad highland area under the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to ancient stone ruins

passing colorful cargo container lying on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient ruins while navigating increasingly rocky terrain

large boulders and rocky outcrops scattered across the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character approaches ancient stone ruins across rocky terrain. A colorful cargo container lies on the ground near the path, and the landscape transitions from grassland to a more rugged, ruin-strewn area with stone towers becoming more prominent.

events.description: entering dense ruin area with tall stone pillars and walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the ancient ruins, navigating between tall stone structures and crumbling walls

entered.detail: tall ancient stone column rising from the ground
crumbling ancient wall structure made of large stone blocks
tall ruined stone tower with broken top

segments.scene_description: The character explores a valley filled with ancient stone ruins, walking between tall pillars and crumbling walls. The stone structures tower over the path as the character navigates deeper into the archaeological site, with the mountain range still visible in the misty background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a tense, rainy mountain ascent into the silent expanse of an ancient ruin-filled valley. It begins on a rocky slope under falling rain, where spectral figures with glowing blue lights flicker across the ridge and dart past the camera. As the character reaches the summit, the narrow path opens into a wide, overcast grassy plateau dotted with small water pools and expansive views of a distant mountain range. The scene then shifts toward more rugged terrain, passing a colorful cargo container on the ground before the grassland gives way to the first signs of weathered stone towers. Finally, the camera moves deep into a misty valley, navigating between towering pillars and crumbling walls as the archaeological site consumes the landscape.
